query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS university_field_images (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  university_name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  research_field_name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  image_url TEXT NOT NULL COMMENT 'S3图片URL',
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  UNIQUE KEY unique_university_field (university_name, research_field_name),
  INDEX idx_university (university_name),
  INDEX idx_field (research_field_name)
) COMMENT='大学专属领域图片库（融合吉祥物元素）';
command:

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS university_field_images (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  university_name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  research_field_name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  image_url TEXT NOT NULL COMMENT 'S3图片URL',
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  UNIQUE KEY unique_university_field (university_name, research_field_name),
  INDEX idx_university (university_name),
  INDEX idx_field (research_field_name)
) COMMENT='大学专属领域图片库（融合吉祥物元素）';
